description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with two visible stories and a complex, multi-sectioned roof structure. The front features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a driveway leading to a garage. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and mature tree for shade. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the roof is clad in dark shingles. Multiple large windows provide ample natural light, and the rear of the house opens onto a landscaped outdoor living space. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, creating a comfortable and inviting residential environment.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a complex roof, large windows, a front porch, garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and garage with driveway access.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced property, and partial view of the backyard and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and large windows opening onto the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional windows, and the full extent of the fenced property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large windows and some asymmetrical placements in the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, double doors, and supporting columns
